transcript.text: I made a mistake turning it down.
It looks lighter, which is why I was asking.
It's like the sun is like...
I feel like it has been a whirlwind...
Are you all moved in at your new place and stuff?
I would not say I'm like fully, fully moved in, but I've started to like, there's just so many things where I'm like, we're going to sell it.
We're not just going to put it out on the street, but I think I'm getting to the point where I'm kind of like...
I want to put it out on the street.
I think we got to give it up, and I think we're just going to get rid of the clutter, but it's like slow and steady.
Are you like fully moved in?
Yeah, I mean, there's just like little things here and there.
But no, guys, it's so nice once it feels like so homey and cozy, and you're like, oh, this is nice.
And like, maybe this is less of a factor for you guys, but like...
Also, it's about to get so cold here.
And if I have to be in my apartment all the time, I really want to enjoy being in my apartment.
So we're in the crunch time for the movie.
But also, I think Vivek is sick, so he probably won't be joining today.
So I can run through the agenda quickly.
And then if you have any other questions, let me know.
But I figure we can go through it pretty quickly.
Um, yeah, let's go through this.
deleting the internal links from those articles.
Articles that were stuck last week due to a tech.
And then working on that newsletter outline and design templates.
I'll get an update for you beginning of next week if she hasn't already proactively shared one.
And I'm getting caught up on emails, but I know she talked about things that she like wanted or needed.
But I don't know if she can send me like, if she hasn't sent me an email, like if I had it listed out of all the things, that would be helpful.
Because I like know we talked about it on the call, but when I've been at the conference and I have stuff, but yeah, she can email me like, hey, here are the things that I need.
Because I'll have to pull it from like different places too.
Just easy to refer back to.
Published new editorial work stream articles last week.
Five more scheduled to go out this week.
Like expanding that new topic list with supply chain, manufacturing, insurance, and financial.
Then we've refreshed four articles last week, six new refreshes lined up for this week.
And then programmatic SEO, GrowthX has identified the following topics for programmatic plays.

That would be industry pages, use case pages, industry pages, industry directory pages, agent marketplace pages, and then awaiting data grids, assistance with the web development, and page design scoping.
So I know that was kind of in limbo until the site was live.
Okay, so when you mean page, sorry, are you talking about like the blog page?
So I can ask specifically like if there's one or if it's for each of these different subsections.
But yes, we were waiting on the templated design so that we can build programmatic on our end.
Because I think we want there to be some integrations or features.
We will obviously drop all of this over Slack as well.
And then one other thing is, I don't know if we have an updated demo for Datagrid.
So we can either do that live in our next sync, or if you have one recorded, I think it would be good for the team just to take it.
I don't think we have a good one recorded.
Let me look at our next sink and make sure Datago's there.
That morning, think, like, highlighting, like, hey, we're going to need you to do this.
I know, I was just looking at his calendar.
Oh, he definitely can't do the next one.
Okay, no, so I think he can do the 23rd, I'm going to put him in the S on there.
He might just be a little bit late, because he'll be coming from another meeting, but he has time open right now.
I'm going to also make a note on my calendar.
And is there, we probably won't need overtime, but if there's a little flexibility on the back end in case it goes over.
Exactly, yeah, if he, like, comes a little late or if we go over.
So let's, like, let's plan on that, and I made a note on my calendar.
And then we'll have him demo the product, and that would be really great to record, and then if you guys can send it to me so I can use that as well.
We were trying to get the website live, so I had this conference, which we have a lot done on the website.
I think we're really, really, really, really close with a B1 and B-Live.
Yeah, so I think we'll get you some of that.
And then that task that you wanted me to do, the Airtable thing, remind me of that?
I don't know if I recall the Airtable.
Like, Airtable, I was, like, given all, there was all these topics, and, like, I had to, like, prune something down.
Do you know what we're talking about, or is this done?
Is this something that needs to be done?
Do you mean the URL pruning, like, unpublishing one of I think so, yeah.
Were you able to unpublish them?
No, I literally haven't touched it.
But I was saying, did someone need me to...
I remember I was talking about it one time.
You sent me the link, and then I don't think we ever talked about it again.
And I'm like, wait, does someone need me to do something?
Thank you very much for flagging that.
So I read URL pruning is finished as the, like, that's been handled.
But I don't know if the team has the capability to unpublish.
If we don't, then that's something we do need to resurface.
Let me just confirm with the team that they didn't do it, like, weren't able to just do it themselves.
And if it still needs to be done, I will flag it in the URL.
So wait, Tiago said that he pruned the list?
This is from the team, like, it would be like Nika or Vivek.
So without him, I'm not totally confident where we're at there.
But I will confirm, like, very shortly.
Probably it might be, like, early next week, just with Vivek out.
Thank you for mentioning it again.
So I don't have to worry about that.
Nothing to worry about right now.
It's on us to tell you to worry about it.
Yeah, because, yeah, it was, like, in Airtable.
But this is the context artifacts.
I think that's, like, nice to have, not essential.
There were a couple of questions open on the artifacts.
Docs, and I can resurface that.
Well, I was just looking it up.
And then there is this Airtable thing, which here I'm going to show you.
But it's quite, this one is quite extensive.
Oh, but it looks like it's been done.
I don't need to do it.
I don't need to do anything.
Do you want me to run through the just performance update really quickly and then I can let you know?
Okay, let me, should I screw it again?
So sessions seem to be recovering from last week's drop.
Google shows non-impressions are up compared to last week.
We're now ranking number one for 209 non-branded keywords.
And then in terms of the categories performance, AI agent architecture content started to show improved clicks and impressions.
Some of those older categories are also performing well.
New categories such as AI agents for finance, real estate, and government are also showing promising signs.
LLM traffic has increased slightly compared to last week.
I think we owe you, I guess, confirmation on if there's anything left to do on the pruning list.
And again, on us to confirm.
And then artifacts, if there is more context that you want to drop in, ideal.
We'll plan on the demo for next week.
And then I'll also ask Andy to share everything that she needs for the newsletter in an email.
And then last thing is also I'm supposed to forget.
think this is coming from Andy, but I need the contract updated with the newsletter wording and verbiage in there.
And then I think also we didn't, I think we're doing a one year.
So they need to resend that over so I can just review it.
Send me a copy first to review and then I'll send it to Tiago.
So I think dates in like that verbiage for the newsletter needs to be added.
I'm like, I keep looking at the clock and I'm like, you're not there yet.
Are you on the East Coast?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [URL pruning completed; newsletter outline/design in progress with Andy](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [New editorial content published/scheduled; programmatic SEO topics identified](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Product demo scheduled for next sync (Oct 23) with Datagrid team](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Website close to B1 and B-Live; contract update needed for newsletter inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [URL pruning finished; deleting internal links from pruned articles](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [5 new editorial work stream articles published last week, 5 more scheduled this week](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Expanding topic list: supply chain, manufacturing, insurance, financial](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [4 articles refreshed last week, 6 new refreshes lined up this week](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO topics identified: industry pages, use case pages, industry directory pages, agent marketplace pages](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Awaiting Datagrid's assistance with web development and page design scoping for programmatic plays](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Newsletter Progress

  - [Andy working on newsletter outline and design templates](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Kaitlin requested a consolidated email from Andy listing all needed items](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Contract update required to include newsletter wording and verbiage](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Product Demo

  - [Scheduled for Oct 23 sync meeting](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Datagrid team (likely Tiago) to present](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [GrowthX team to record for future use](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Website Development

  - [B1 and B-Live versions close to completion](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Progress made during recent conference](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Sessions recovering from last week's drop](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Google non-branded impressions up](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - Ranking \#1 for 209 non-branded keywords
  - [AI agent architecture content showing improved clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [New categories (AI agents for finance, real estate, government) showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [LLM traffic slightly increased](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to confirm if any tasks remain for URL pruning list](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Andy to email Kaitlin with consolidated list of newsletter needs](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Prepare for product demo on Oct 23 sync (Datagrid team)](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [GrowthX to update contract with newsletter verbiage and one-year term](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Kaitlin to review updated contract before sending to Tiago](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide any additional context for artifacts document](https://fathom.video/share/nsaD_KxsY8Kzs6QxZtKV5hRBMbosssyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

action_items.description: Email Andy re: send newsletter needs list to Kaitlin
Confirm w/ team programmatic page templates (industry/use-case/directory/marketplace)
Add Datago to Oct 23 sync; prep live demo; record and send to Kaitlin
Confirm w/ Nika/Vivek Airtable/URL unpublish status; update Kaitlin
Email Kaitlin updated contract w/ newsletter wording and 1-yr term
